sections.paragraph:
Original: טבליהוּ

Transliteration: ṭebalyâhû

Phonetic: teb-al-yaw'-hoo

BDB Definition:

Tebaliah = "purified"
  1. the 3rd son of Hosah of the children of Merari and temple gatekeeper

Origin: from H2881 and H3050

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
